localization.title: Help translate PaladinsCat
localization.description: Translations are submitted as a GitHub pull request and require review before they reach production.
localization.signIn: Sign in to apply for translator access.
localization.signInOpen: Sign in to contribute a translation. Every submission is reviewed before it can reach production.
localization.openDescription: Anyone with a PaladinsCat account may contribute. Submissions remain pending until an administrator approves them and opens a reviewed GitHub pull request.
localization.applyDescription: Tell the PaladinsCat team which languages or areas you would like to help with.
localization.trustedDescription: Open contribution is already available. Apply here only if you want trusted translator access for direct collaboration.
localization.denied: Your previous application was not approved. You may submit an updated application.
localization.noMySubmissions: You have not submitted any translations yet.
localization.published: Pull request created. Review it before merging.
localization.localTolgeeDescription: Create a scoped contribution token, run Tolgee privately on your computer, and use the PaladinsCat sync CLI. PaladinsCat never connects to your local Docker service.
localization.tokenOnce: Copy this token now. It is shown only once and cannot administer your PaladinsCat account.
localization.error: Localization request failed. Please try again.
localization.noSubmissions: No submissions awaiting review or rebase.
